name: tech archive duck
goal: 为 tech_archive_explainer 模板提供统一鸭子IP，但每页姿态、位置和动效必须变化，避免固定占位。

animation_grammar.layout_rule: duck placement must follow content area and avoid covering key media cards
animation_grammar.distribution_rule: across full video include right, center and left placements
animation_grammar.size_rule: duck size varies by page emphasis and available whitespace

do_not_use: fixed right-only placement across all scenes
single static duck size across all scenes
